a:r.a:t: Bottom-Up Methodology | Filtering FPDS contract-award data from 2,539 federal PSCs down to 65 ship-MRO services codes sizes the FY2025 Navy and Coast Guard MRO contracting TAM at $9.0B
1. Filter federal PSCs to USN / USCG services-class codes
3. Apply FY2025 obligations to size the MRO TAM
Source: FPDS FY2025 contract obligations, U.S. Navy and U.S. Coast Guard (65 ship-MRO PSCs). Data as of April 2026.
J, K, N, H, L, M
